item.title: Webinar: Advanced Building Envelope Inspections - default - BOMA / CHICAGO
item.description: Building envelope inspection methods are advancing rapidly, offering new ways to assess building performance, durability, and risk.

item.title: Viewing Defects in Compound Semiconductor Materials with Electron Channelling Contrast Imaging
item.description: Join us for an in-depth exploration of Electron Channelling Contrast Imaging (ECCI), a powerful scanning electron microscopy technique that enables direct visualization of crystallographic defects in compound semiconductors.

item.title: VisiConsult's AI Defect Detection in Aerospace Webinar
item.description: Discover how AI transforms aerospace NDT in VisiConsult’s webinar on 11th November 2025 with experts from PFW Aerospace and VisiConsult. Register Now!

item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar
item.description: Learn AI-powered drone inspection for power transmission lines. Join our expert webinar on automated defect detection with AeroMegh GeoAI platform.

item.title: AI Agents in Nondestructive Testing: From Concept to Implementation
item.description: Discover how to build practical no-code AI agents to streamline workflows, improve decision-making, and increase efficiency for NDT professionals, quality managers, and inspection engineers.

item.title: Sensofar webinars - Our knowledge and expertise available for you
item.description: Upcoming and recording webinars from all of the presented sessions. You will find interesting information here. Watch them!

item.title: Altus and Koh Young to Host Webinar Showcasing AI Applications in Inspection Software - What's New in Electronics
item.description: Altus Group, a distributor of capital equipment for the electronics manufacturing industry in the UK and Ireland, and Koh Young Technology, a global provider of True 3D measurement-based inspection systems, will host a technical webinar on 28 April 2026 showcasing how artificial intelligence (AI) is being applied within inspection software to improve process control and […]
